mapper.select: SELECT id, category_name, parent_id, sort_order, create_time, update_time, is_deleted FROM book_category WHERE is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY parent_id ASC, sort_order ASC
SELECT id, category_name, parent_id, sort_order, create_time, update_time, is_deleted FROM book_category WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort_order ASC
SELECT id, category_name, parent_id, sort_order, create_time, update_time, is_deleted FROM book_category WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO book_category (category_name, parent_id, sort_order) VALUES (#{categoryName}, #{parentId}, #{sortOrder})
mapper.update: UPDATE book_category SET category_name = #{categoryName}, parent_id = #{parentId}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
